privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Chrome profile with bookmarks, history, and cookies injected via Python SQLite operations in setup_task.sh. Verified that the exact required protected domains (qbp.com, si.shimano.com, sram.com) and banned domains (youtube.com, doordash.com, pinkbike.com, spotify.com) match the setup script injections and task instructions. The expected folders (E-Bike Diagnostics, B2B Suppliers, Service Manuals), font sizes (24 default, 18 minimum), and download directory (Service_Manuals) explicitly align with the task description. Additionally, discovered a critical defect: verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable because the success specification (verifier.py::verify_task) points to a non-existent script.
